zh.Stamford, Kesteven, Lincolnshire, Englan: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯坦福

zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Browne II於1248年出生在英國林可爾史爾斯坦福時，他的父親Sir John Browne I.48歲，母親Joan Elizabeth Cheshire18歲。他於1269年與Dorthea Swinstead在英國林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1312年在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯坦福享年64歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾斯坦福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Browne II于1248年出生在英国林可爾史爾斯坦福时，他的父亲Sir John Browne I.48岁，母亲Joan Elizabeth Cheshire18岁。他于1269年与Dorthea Swinstead在英国林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1312年在英国英格兰林可爾史爾斯坦福享年64岁，埋葬在英国英格兰林可爾史爾斯坦福。

nameMeanings.name: Browne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably also an Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Braune   or   Braun  .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

variants.name: Brown
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: generally a nickname referring to the color of the hair or complexion, Middle English br(o)un, from Old English brūn or Old French brun. This word is occasionally found in Old French, Middle English and Old Norse as a personal name or byname (Middle English personal name Brun, Broun, ancient Germanic Bruno, Old English Brūn, or possibly Old Norse Brúnn or Brúni). Brun- was also an ancient Germanic name-forming element. Some instances of Old English Brūn as a personal name may therefore be short forms of compound names such as Brūngar, Brūnwine, etc. As a Scottish and Irish name, it sometimes represents a translation of Gaelic Donn (see below). Brown (including in the senses below) is the fourth most frequent surname in the US. It is also very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below).
Irish and Scottish: adopted for Ó Duinn (see Dunn ) or for any of the many Irish and Scottish Gaelic names containing the element donn ‘brown-haired’ (also meaning ‘chieftain’), for example Donahue .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Browne II was born in 1248, in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, his father, Sir John Browne I., was 48 and his mother, Joan Elizabeth Cheshire, was 18. He married Dorthea Swinstead in 1269, in Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died in 1312, in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64, and was buried in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Browne II est né en 1248, à Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Browne I., avait 48 ans et sa mère, Joan Elizabeth Cheshire, avait 18 ans. Il a épousé Dorthea Swinstead en 1269, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1312, à Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Stamford, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Browne II 1248 in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Browne I. 48 und seine Mutter Joan Elizabeth Cheshire 18. Er hat 1269 in Lincolnshire, England Dorthea Swinstead geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1312 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Browne II è nato il nel 1248 nel Stamford, Lincolnshire, England, il suo padre, Sir John Browne I., aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Joan Elizabeth Cheshire, aveva 18 anni. Lui sposato Dorthea Swinstead nel 1269, nel Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1312, nel Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 64 anni, e fu sepolto a Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Browne IIが1248年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタムフォードで生まれた時，父Sir John Browne I.は48歳，母Joan Elizabeth Cheshireは18歳であった。1269年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアでDorthea Swinsteadと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1312年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタムフォードで64歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアスタムフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Browne II(이)가 1248년 영국 링코실르 스타퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Browne I.(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Elizabeth Cheshire(은)는 18세였다. 그는 1269년 영국 링코실르에서 Dorthea Swinstead(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1312년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스타퍼드에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 스타퍼드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Browne II nasceu em 1248, em Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Browne I., tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Joan Elizabeth Cheshire, tinha 18 anos. Ele casou-se com Dorthea Swinstead em 1269, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1312, em Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 64 anos, e foi sepultado em Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Browne II родился в 1248 г. в местности стамфорд, линколншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Browne I. было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Elizabeth Cheshire, 18. Он женился на женщине по имени Dorthea Swinstead в 1269 г. в местности линколншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1312 г. в местности стамфорд, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности стамфорд, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Browne II nació en 1248, en Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Browne I., tenía 48 años y su mamá, Joan Elizabeth Cheshire, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Dorthea Swinstead en 1269, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió en 1312, en Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 64 años, y fue sepultado en Stamford, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
